overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza from Cyberpunk 2077. The player moves along an elevated wooden walkway past food vendors, under massive overpasses, and through a neon-lit commercial district with towering skyscrapers, flying vehicles, and dense palm tree landscaping.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with food vendors and seating

events.description: passing the food stall kiosk and entering the open walkway
camera briefly turns toward pedestrians sitting on yellow benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden elevated pathway, passing by a food vendor and seated pedestrians

notable_agents.action: sitting on a yellow bench against the red wall, holding a drink

entered.detail: red and white food stall with illuminated menu displays and palm tree decorations on roof
elevated wooden plank pathway with visible grain and warm tone
tall curved red concrete wall lining the right side of the walkway
bright yellow and green painted concrete seating attached to the red wall
massive concrete and steel elevated highway structure spanning across the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a food stall kiosk on an elevated wooden walkway. The camera moves forward past yellow benches where NPCs are seated against a red retaining wall. The path leads toward a massive overpass structure in the distance, with sparse vegetation on the left and clear blue skies above.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional underpass with views of skyscrapers and flying traffic

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal flying vehicles and massive skyscrapers against the sun
entering the covered underpass beneath the elevated highway, lighting becomes shaded

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the skyline, then proceeding through a shaded underpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket walking toward camera on the left side

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with distinctive yellow and black striped facade and glass windows
futuristic hovering cars passing overhead between the skyscrapers
elevated yellow rail system curving between buildings high above
concrete tunnel with metal ceiling panels and digital advertisements on walls

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts up to reveal a stunning cyberpunk skyline with flying vehicles weaving between massive skyscrapers. The path continues under a large overpass into a shaded concrete underpass. The ground transitions from wood to concrete as the camera moves through the tunnel-like structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza lined with palm trees and digital signage

events.description: exiting the underpass into a bright open plaza with tiled flooring and shops
crowd density increases with multiple pedestrians walking and sitting along the path

agents.ego_description: walking through the bustling plaza, navigating between pedestrians and palm tree planters

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking toward camera, one in white tank top and two in casual wear

entered.detail: light-colored stone tile pavement replacing the wooden deck
tall palm trees in large planters lining both sides of the walkway
small vendor stalls with colorful awnings and digital displays
massive building with large archway connecting two towers, covered in advertisements

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens into a wide commercial plaza with light stone tile flooring. Tall palm trees line both sides of the path, creating a dense canopy. The area is populated with moderate pedestrian traffic, including groups walking and individuals sitting on planters. Massive skyscrapers with digital billboards tower overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale outdoor bar district with neon lighting and glass architectural features

events.description: entering the bar district with prominent purple neon lighting and glass floor sections
passing over glass floor panels revealing lower level, with purple neon reflecting off surfaces

agents.ego_description: walking through the bar area, observing the neon-lit establishments and glass architectural features

notable_agents.action: patron in yellow plaid shirt sitting at outdoor bar table

entered.detail: open-air bar with purple neon lighting, high tables, and stools
transparent glass panels in the walkway revealing lower level with plants
bright magenta and purple illuminated signs reading PASSION and other advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into an upscale bar district characterized by vibrant purple neon lighting and modern glass architecture. The camera passes over transparent glass floor sections revealing greenery below. An outdoor bar with magenta neon signs occupies the left side, while the path continues toward more commercial buildings and digital billboards in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunny elevated walkway through a concrete underpass and into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district. It begins at a food stall kiosk, moving past yellow benches and a red retaining wall toward a massive overpass under clear blue skies. As the camera tilts up to reveal a skyline of skyscrapers and flying vehicles, the path transitions from wood to concrete while passing through the shaded tunnel of the overpass. The scene then opens into a wide stone plaza lined with tall palm trees and populated by pedestrians, with towering digital billboards dominating the view overhead. Finally, the environment shifts into an upscale bar district characterized by purple neon lighting and glass architecture, gliding over transparent floor sections toward magenta signs and distant commercial buildings.
